Metadata.title: Quiet Riots
Metadata.description: Berorganisasi mengenai isu bersama. Cari kumpulan anda. Bertindak bersama.

Footer.mission: Mengubah lebih banyak perkara menjadi lebih baik dalam hidup kita, melebihi apa yang kita berani bayangkan.
Footer.powered: Quiet Riots · Dikuasakan oleh OpenClaw AI Agent

Home.headline: Perubahan tidak perlu kuat untuk menjadi berkuasa
Home.description: Cari orang lain yang berkongsi isu yang sama. Bertindak bersama. Quiet Riots menghubungkan orang ramai yang mempunyai kekecewaan yang sama dan menukar aduan menjadi tindakan kolektif.
Home.findYourIssueDesc: Cari apa sahaja yang mengecewakan anda — pengangkutan, internet, kesihatan, iklim. Jika ia wujud, kami akan tunjukkan berapa ramai orang lain yang merasakan perkara sama.
Home.useThePivotDesc: Lihat isu yang sama di semua organisasi, atau semua isu di satu organisasi. Seperti penari tango bertukar arah.
Home.takeActionDesc: Idea, tindakan, dan komuniti — disesuaikan dengan masa dan kemahiran anda. Tindakan kecil terkumpul menjadi perubahan besar.
Home.missionQuote: "Mengubah lebih banyak perkara menjadi lebih baik dalam hidup kita, melebihi apa yang kita berani bayangkan."
Home.basedOn: Berdasarkan buku tahun 2014 Quiet Riots oleh Simon Darling

Issues.title: Isu
Issues.subtitle: {count} isu merentasi {categoryCount} kategori. Cari isu anda.
Issues.noResults: Tiada isu dijumpai. Cuba carian atau kategori lain.

IssueDetail.gatherEvidenceDesc: Dokumentasi apa yang berlaku — siaran langsung atau kongsi gambar, video, dan pautan.
IssueDetail.riotReelsDesc: Video kelakar dan satira yang menangkap semangat Quiet Riot ini.
IssueDetail.expertsDesc: Sukarelawan berdedikasi yang mendalami — penterjemah, pakar, ketua media, penasihat undang-undang.
IssueDetail.pendingBanner: This Quiet Riot is under review — you can gather evidence and share your thoughts while it's being reviewed.

Organisations.title: Organisasi
Organisations.subtitle: Lihat organisasi dan isu apa yang orang ada dengan setiap satu.
Organisations.noResults: Tiada organisasi dijumpai untuk kategori ini.

OrgDetail.paretoDesc: Beberapa isu biasanya mewakili 80% daripada semua aduan. Isu teratas di bawah disusun mengikut bilangan orang yang terjejas.

Campaigns.title: Kempen
Campaigns.subtitle: {count} {count, plural, one {kempen} other {kempen}} mengumpul dana untuk perubahan.
Campaigns.noResults: Tiada kempen dijumpai. Cuba penapis lain.

CampaignDetail.topUpFirst: Isi dompet anda dahulu untuk mula menyumbang.
CampaignDetail.createAccountPrompt: Buat akaun dan isi dompet anda untuk menyokong kempen ini.
CampaignDetail.completedMessage: Kempen ini telah {status}. Terima kasih kepada semua {count} penyokong!

Assistants.title: Pembantu
Assistants.subtitle: {count} pasangan AI agent dan penganjur membantu peserta bertindak.

AssistantDetail.openRole: Peranan penganjur terbuka kepada sesiapa yang berminat dengan kategori ini. Nyatakan minat anda di bawah.

Wallet.title: Dompet Anda
Wallet.createPromptDesc: Buat akaun percuma untuk mengisi dana dan menyumbang kepada kempen yang penting bagi anda.

Profile.title: Profil Anda
Profile.findIssues: Cari isu yang anda ambil berat dan sertai gerakan.
Profile.noConnectedAccounts: Belum ada akaun yang disambungkan. Log masuk dengan Google atau Facebook untuk memautkan akaun anda.
Profile.cannotUnlinkLast: Tidak boleh menyahpaut satu-satunya akaun yang disambungkan
Profile.deactivateConfirm: Adakah anda pasti mahu menyahaktifkan akaun anda? Anda boleh mengaktifkan semula dalam tempoh 30 hari.

Auth.signInLinkSent: Kami telah menghantar pautan log masuk ke e-mel anda. Klik pautan untuk meneruskan.
Auth.signUpLinkSent: Kami telah menghantar pautan log masuk ke e-mel anda. Klik pautan untuk membuat akaun.
Auth.verifyDesc: Pautan log masuk telah dihantar ke alamat e-mel anda. Klik pautan untuk meneruskan.
Auth.errorAccess: Akses ditolak. Anda mungkin tidak mempunyai kebenaran untuk log masuk.
Auth.errorVerification: Pautan log masuk telah tamat tempoh atau sudah digunakan.

ProfileEdit.title: Edit profil
ProfileEdit.skillsPlaceholder: cth: reka bentuk, penulisan, undang-undang, pengaturcaraan
ProfileEdit.skillsHint: Dipisahkan koma. Membantu memadankan anda dengan tindakan yang relevan.

CookieConsent.title: Pilihan kuki
CookieConsent.description: Kami menggunakan kuki untuk memastikan anda kekal log masuk dan meningkatkan pengalaman anda. Kuki analitik membantu kami memahami cara laman digunakan.
CookieConsent.essentialDescription: Diperlukan agar laman berfungsi. Tidak boleh dimatikan.
CookieConsent.analyticsDescription: Membantu kami memahami cara anda menggunakan laman supaya kami boleh memperbaikinya.

Onboarding.interestsSubtitle: Pilih kategori yang penting bagi anda. Kami akan tunjukkan isu dan tindakan yang berkaitan.
Onboarding.interestsSelected: {count, plural, =0 {Tiada kategori dipilih} other {# kategori dipilih}}
Onboarding.languageSubtitle: Kami mengesan bahasa pelayar anda. Anda boleh menukarnya di sini.
Onboarding.countrySubtitle: Ini membantu kami memaparkan isu tempatan dan menetapkan mata wang anda.
Onboarding.countrySkip: Senarai negara tidak tersedia. Anda boleh tetapkan kemudian di profil.

RejectionReasons.title: Why Quiet Riots Get Rejected
RejectionReasons.subtitle: Understanding the review process
RejectionReasons.intro: Every suggestion for a new Quiet Riot is reviewed by a Setup Guide to ensure it fits the platform and can make a real difference. Here are the reasons a suggestion might not be approved:
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingTitle: Close to an Existing Quiet Riot
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP1: If your suggestion is very similar to a Quiet Riot that already exists, we'll merge your suggestion into the existing one. This keeps the community focused and prevents fragmentation. The more people behind one Quiet Riot, the bigger the impact.
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP2: When this happens, you'll be automatically added to the existing Quiet Riot so you can start taking action right away.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP1: Quiet Riots are about shared issues, not about targeting individuals. We focus on systemic problems — things like poor broadband, rising energy costs, or inadequate healthcare — rather than personal grievances with specific people.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP2: If you're frustrated with a specific person or public figure, try framing it as the underlying issue instead. For example, instead of targeting a CEO, suggest a Quiet Riot about the company's practices.
RejectionReasons.illegalP1: We can't host Quiet Riots that promote or organise illegal activities. This includes anything that violates applicable laws, promotes violence, or could put people at risk.
RejectionReasons.otherP1: Occasionally a suggestion might not fit for another reason — perhaps it's too vague, or the Setup Guide needs more information. In these cases, you'll receive a message explaining why and what you can do next.
RejectionReasons.whatNextIntro: If your suggestion is rejected, you can always:
RejectionReasons.reframe: Reframe and try again — adjust the name or description to better fit the guidelines
RejectionReasons.joinExisting: Join an existing Quiet Riot — your issue might already be covered
RejectionReasons.replyGuide: Reply to the Setup Guide — if you think the rejection was a mistake, send a message explaining your case

AnonymousInfo.title: Anonymous First Rioters
AnonymousInfo.subtitle: What being anonymous means
AnonymousInfo.intro: When someone starts a new Quiet Riot, they become the First Quiet Rioter. This is a badge of honour — the person who had the courage to speak up first.
AnonymousInfo.choosingIntro: Not everyone wants their name attached to an issue publicly. That's completely fine. When the First Quiet Rioter chooses to stay anonymous:
AnonymousInfo.choosingHidden: Their name and profile picture are hidden from the issue page
AnonymousInfo.choosingBadge: An anonymous badge is shown instead, so people know someone started it without knowing who
AnonymousInfo.choosingGuides: The Setup Guides still know who started it (for moderation purposes)
AnonymousInfo.choosingChange: The First Rioter can change their mind later and choose to be publicly recognised
AnonymousInfo.whyIntro: There are many valid reasons to stay anonymous:
AnonymousInfo.whySensitive: The issue is sensitive or controversial
AnonymousInfo.whyWork: You work for a company related to the issue
AnonymousInfo.whyCause: You prefer to let the cause speak for itself
AnonymousInfo.changingP1: If you started a Quiet Riot anonymously but later decide you want to be recognised, you can update your preference at any time through your inbox or by messaging a Setup Guide.

SuggestPage.title: Suggest a New Quiet Riot
SuggestPage.subtitle: Can't find your issue? Suggest a new Quiet Riot and we'll review it.

SuggestForm.namePlaceholder: e.g. Mobile Data Costs, Pothole Crisis...
SuggestForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell us more about this issue...
SuggestForm.publicRecognition: Show me as the First Quiet Rioter (uncheck to stay anonymous)
SuggestForm.successMessage: Your Quiet Riot is now in the waiting room. A Setup Guide will review it within the hour. You can gather evidence and share your thoughts while it's being reviewed.
